title: disperis oxyglossa
intro: Disperis oxyglossa, also known as the yellow fairy orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain a range of bioactive compounds. Traditionally, Disperis oxyglossa has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Disperis oxyglossa are often made by infusing the roots in water or using them in tinctures to take advantage of its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
